summary: High‑end recording equipment delivers excellent sound quality, but no musical details are provided for the show.
review: The tape was captured with a Schoeps CMC521 mic chain feeding a Sonosax SX‑M2 preamp and an Apogee AD‑500E converter by Eliot Byron, earning praise as a "great job" from the reviewer. No comments were made about the performance, setlist or individual band members, so the musical assessment remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single brief review is available; it praises the recording quality strongly but gives no information on the show, leading to a moderate rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded with high‑end gear (Schoeps CMC521 > Sonosax SX‑M2 > Apogee AD‑500E); reviewer notes a "great job" indicating clear, well‑balanced capture.
